data.title: GM To Sell Stake In Michigan Battery Plant To JV Partner For Nearly $1B
data.description: General Motors will sell its stake in Ultium Cells LLC's battery cell plant in Lansing, Michigan to its joint venture partner LG Energy Solution, the automaker said in a statement on Monday.

data.title: UBS Forecasts S&P 500 To Hit 6,600 In 2025, Citing Support From 'Over-Easy Global Central Bank Policy'
CleanSpark CEO Zach Bradford Explains Why The Company Is Betting on Bitcoin Mining, Not Buying
data.description: CleanSpark Inc. (NASDAQ:CLSK) said Monday that much of its shareholder value is derived from investments in mining facilities, rather than adding Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) to its balance sheet.

data.title: Does A $1K Monthly Basic Income Check Change How People View Work? Sam Altman's Study Leaves Researchers Surprised
data.description: On Monday Dec. 2, 2024, a study funded by OpenAI CEO Sam Altman unveiled surprising findings that challenge core arguments against basic income programs, showing recipients placed higher value on work after receiving monthly payments.

data.title: S&P, Nasdaq Settle At Record Highs As Tesla, SMCI Surge: Fear Index Remains In 'Greed' Zone
